ddls:
CREATE TABLE "move_types" (
  "move_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of move */,
  "move_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the move type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the move type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the move type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the move type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distance_ranges" (
  "distance_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distance range */,
  "distance_range_name" TEXT /* Name of the distance range */,
  "min_distance" REAL /* Minimum distance in kilometers */,
  "max_distance" REAL /* Maximum distance in kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the distance range was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the distance range was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distance_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_estimates" (
  "cost_estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost estimate */,
  "move_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move type */,
  "distance_range_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distance range */,
  "min_cost" REAL /* Minimum cost in Indian Rupees (INR) */,
  "max_cost" REAL /* Maximum cost in Indian Rupees (INR) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cost estimate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cost estimate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_estimates_distance_range_id FOREIGN KEY ("distance_range_id") REFERENCES distance_ranges ("distance_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_estimates_move_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_type_id") REFERENCES move_types ("move_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_locations" (
  "service_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service location */,
  "service_location_name" TEXT /* Name of the service location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the service location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the service location is situated */,
  "pincode" TEXT /* Pincode of the service location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_inquiries" (
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer inquiry */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "move_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move type requested */,
  "distance_range_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distance range requested */,
  "service_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service location requested */,
  "inquiry_date" TEXT /* Date of the inquiry */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inquiry (e.g., pending, processed, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer inquiry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer inquiry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inquiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_inquiries_move_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_type_id") REFERENCES move_types ("move_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_inquiries_service_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_location_id") REFERENCES service_locations ("service_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_inquiries_distance_range_id FOREIGN KEY ("distance_range_id") REFERENCES distance_ranges ("distance_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, employee, customer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "quotes" (
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quote */,
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer inquiry */,
  "cost_estimate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cost estimate used for the quote */,
  "quote_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the quote in Indian Rupees (INR) */,
  "quote_date" TEXT /* Date the quote was issued */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the quote (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quote was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quote was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_inquiry_id FOREIGN KEY ("inquiry_id") REFERENCES customer_inquiries ("inquiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_cost_estimate_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_estimate_id") REFERENCES cost_estimates ("cost_estimate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quote */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, debit card, cash) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid in Indian Rupees (INR) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, successful, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_quote_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_id") REFERENCES quotes ("quote_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., service usage, revenue, customer satisfaction) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Actual data in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communication_logs" (
  "communication_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication log */,
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer inquiry */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date the communication took place */,
  "communication_method" TEXT /* Method of communication (e.g., phone, email, chat) */,
  "communication_details" TEXT /* Actual details of the communication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the communication log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the communication log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communication_logs_inquiry_id FOREIGN KEY ("inquiry_id") REFERENCES customer_inquiries ("inquiry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions corresponding to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
